## RedisQueue class

Class RedisQueue Implements simple messaging queue over redis.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class RedisQueue extends EventEmitter implements IMessageQueue 
```
**Extends:** EventEmitter

**Implements:** [IMessageQueue](/api/core/1.3.15/core.imessagequeue/)
